technical_replicate: the reactions were performed in triplicate in a V-well 96-well polypropylene microtiter plate.
experimental_design: the aim was to capitalize on the potency of the benzothiophene of 822 while reducing the potential metabolic liabilities of that motif.
factor_value: the aim was to optimize the potency of this series against MRSA.
